text:
Message Editing: improved experience, making it easier to type & edit long messages.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Calls: Improved overall call stability.
Video: Added the option to hide your self-view during video calls.
Reactions: Added more emojis.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Replies (Major Feature): Now available across Mobile, Web and Desktop apps.
Editor+: New option for the Editor role to allow or restrict item downloads.
Connection Management: Remove a Contact & Reconnect anytime.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.

Better user connection experience.
More reliable file uploads on unstable networks.
Bug Fixes & Minor Improvements.
